strategy: Death boss (19,760) with no listed boost. Avoid Life and Ice attacks; his Breeze Shield gives him -70% to Life and Ice, refreshed every six rounds. Hit with Fire, Storm, Myth, or a prism.
His Grimoire pet casts Power Link to heal him whenever he or his minions are attacked, so expect some healback. Use Doom and Gloom or Infection to cut it and burst hard.
Join on time; a late wizard eats a -100% Virulent Plague, -100% Black Mantle, and -100% Infection, crippling accuracy and damage.
Blade up, avoid Life and Ice, and land a big off-school hit; watch for his pet's own Deer Knight and Burning Rampage casts.
cheatNotes: Late arrival gets hit with -100% Virulent Plague, Black Mantle, and Infection, a crippling triple debuff. Zone in on time.
Round 1 he casts Breeze Shield, giving himself -70% to Life and Ice. Do not attack with Life or Ice; use another school.
He refreshes that Breeze Shield every six rounds, so the Life and Ice resistance keeps coming back. Stick to your off-school hitter.
His Grimoire pet Power Links to heal him whenever he or his minions are hit. Use Infection or Doom and Gloom and burst through the healback.
